creator: dougb@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed


I think that rather than trying to diagnose your problem here, it would be 
easier to do so on freebsd-rc@FreeBSD.org. 

Please send a message to that list with your information that you presented 
here, and also please do the following: 

1. Send a diff of the original mrtg script and your my_ version. 
2. Enable the console.log in /etc/syslog.conf 
3. Add rc_debug=1 and rc_info=1 to /etc/rc.conf, and reboot. 
4. Make the console.log file available somewhere that we can review it 
(a web site, etc.). Please do not send the whole log in e-mail.
